channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: THM-SOURCE Writeup
item.description: TryHackMe-Source: Exploit a recent vulnerability and hack Webmin, a web-based system configuration tool 10.10.38.68 - > source.thm I’m going to start the challenge by scanning the ip with nmap as in every challenge. The output: Port 22 for ssh and 10000 is the default port for Webmin And the link would be https://10.10.38.68:10000 Unfortunately we don’t know the username and password to ssh and webmin and I tried to search directories with gobuster, but nothing ☹.
